title: telophyllum quadriflorum
intro: Telophyllum quadriflorum is a plant species commonly known as the four-flowered telophyllum, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to the presence of bioactive compounds like flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Telophyllum quadriflorum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various ailments, such as bronchitis and asthma. Telophyllum quadriflorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory and fever-related conditions.
